title: TS2 1UB, Fine Environmental Services Limited: environmental permit draft decision advertisement - EPR/ZP3438CF/V003
body: "The Environment Agency consults the public on certain applications for:    waste and mining waste operations   installations   water discharge and groundwater activities   medium combustion plant and specified generators    In some cases they also consult on draft decisions for environmental permits.  The arrangements are explained in its Public Participation Statement  These notices explain:    the Environment Agency’s proposed decision and the reasons and considerations on which they have based this   any information or guidance provided by the Secretary of State relevant to the application   "
